mechanism_narrative: A sustained low level of the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly increasing present valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate signals immediate labor market deterioration and impending recession, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and produces negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or t-test p-value exceeds 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and capital demand growth, which drives corporate revenue acceleration and positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.1) in out-of-sample regression, or joint signal fails to predict positive returns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index reflects immediate supply-side momentum and capacity utilization that translates into short-term positive equity returns within one week as markets price in near-term output growth.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no directional bias when INDPRO increases, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices combined with stagnant federal funds rates signal real rate compression and policy lag, which triggers negative forward returns as markets price in imminent aggressive monetary tightening.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to predict negative returns when inflation exceeds threshold, or interaction effect is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls provides a persistent positive earnings tailwind that supports higher equity valuations and generates positive forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are uncorrelated with payroll growth, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth falling below the 1.5% threshold indicates demand contraction that reduces corporate profit expectations, which directly drives negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in > 50% of instances when GDP growth falls below threshold, or signal loses predictive power in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising industrial production and falling unemployment confirms broad-based economic strength, which produces positive forward returns as earnings revisions accelerate across sectors.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power when industrial production and unemployment move in the same direction, or Rank IC < 0.03.
